notes: Smarter flashcards. The app now uses FSRS, a modern spaced-repetition scheduler that adapts to each word — easy words come back much later, tricky ones sooner — for the same memory with fewer reviews. Lessons now split into a 'new words' step and an end-of-day 'review' step (capped so it never piles up; the rest waits in the Words tab). Your existing progress carries over.
